title: Fix handling of man page for make install

comments.body: Can we more closely mirror what automake would do here?  By that I mean only referencing $(DESTDIR) in install-related targets, making $(MANDIR) relative to $(DATADIR), itself relative to $(PREFIX), and installing man pages to $(MANDIR)/man1/.
nalind, this worked with the spec file so I think it is ready to be merged.

:sunny: Test successful - [status-redhatci](https://s3.amazonaws.com/aos-ci/ghprb/projectatomic/buildah/767389c87dc10df56014422183b8c79170af3841.1492547167490469632/index.html)
